description: Canonical local service agent governance records. Machine-local runtime homes, credentials, command lines, process IDs, logs, and generated data stay in reports/.

agents.source: codex-calendar-todo local runtime verification; Agent Ops project registry
agents.notes: Loopback-only calendar, task, and Agent Ops workspace. Keep local state, OAuth tokens, runtime logs, spool files, and generated records out of canonical registry data.
Resident loopback archive/index worker with agent-helper handoff. Keep bearer token, service home, logs, and generated index data out of canonical registry records.

agents.source: LM Studio local agent prototype for local safe filesystem actions
agents.notes: Prototype entrypoint uses LM Studio APIs for index/search/ask workflows; keep workspace path, model IDs, and generated indexes out of canonical registry data.
